app.name: The Cube
app.maintenanceMessage: The Cube is temporarily under maintenance. Please try again later.
app.blockedMessage: This version of The Cube is no longer supported. Please install the official version.

update.title: The Cube 2.0.61 is ready
update.message: Install the latest version for improved playback loading, better embedded playback, and smoother TV navigation.
releaseNotes: Playback now checks quick direct results first while slower results can still appear later
The server selector updates progressively and keeps failed entries retryable for that request
The Load More control is easier to reach in the server selector
Embedded playback now uses the refreshed player URL and improves Android TV remote focus
Embedded playback gets a fuller video surface while keeping app-side server controls available
Sports popup players now open inside the app and can be closed before returning to Sports
Playback request headers and stream type detection were tightened for HLS and direct files
Public update text no longer exposes internal provider details

items.title: The Cube 2.0.61
items.message: Playback loading, embedded playback, and TV navigation were improved.

items.title: Active Development Notice
items.message: THE CUBE is under heavy, active development. Expect frequent updates, sometimes multiple times a week, as features are added, bugs are fixed, and things get reworked. Breaking changes, UI shifts, and rough edges are part of the process right now.

items.title: Support The Cube
items.message: Support is optional and helps development. Third-party servers may still go down or return errors.
